summary: Farm website project with real farm photos. Instagram linked to NB Farm profile, Facebook removed. Images updated: IMG_8398 as 'Lemon Trees', IMG_8399 as 'Flowering Mangoes', IMG_8402 as 'Farm Greenery'.

Social links: Instagram linked to NB Farm profile; Facebook button removed
imageRequirements:

existing_features.title: In the FarmGallerySection, replace the existing 'fresh lemon tree' gallery image with the uploaded photo IMG_8398-1.jpeg and update its label/caption to 'Lemon Trees'.

In the FarmGallerySection, replace the existing farm granary gallery image with the uploaded photo IMG_8399-1.jpeg (flowering mango trees at sunset) and update its label/caption to 'Flowering Mangoes'.
In the FarmGallerySection, replace the existing farm entrance gallery image with the uploaded photo IMG_8402-1.jpeg (palm tree lined farm path) and update its label/caption to 'Farm Greenery'.
